# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { IncomingMessage, ServerResponse } from 'http';

export default function (req: IncomingMessage, res: ServerResponse) {
    // Check if request method is POST
    if(req.method === "POST"){
        const chunks = [];
        
        req.on('data', chunk => chunks.push(chunk));
        
        req.on('end', () => {
            const body = Buffer.concat(chunks);
            
            // Stream the response back to client with provided headers and content from POST body
            res.writeHead(200, {'Content-Type': 'text/plain'});
            res.write(body);
            res.end();
        });
    } else {
        // Send 405 if request method is not POST
        res.statusCode = 405;
        res.end('Method Not Allowed');
    }
}
